steps.title: Substitute the input
steps.content: The function is $h(x)=7|x|$, and the question asks for $h(-3)$. Substitute $-3$ for $x$ in the function definition.

steps.title: Evaluate the absolute value
steps.content:
The substitution gives
$$h(-3)=7|-3|$$
The absolute value of $-3$ is $3$, so the negative input becomes positive before multiplying by $7$.

steps.title: Multiply to find the output
steps.content: Now simplify the expression: $$h(-3)=7(3)=21$$ The function output for the given input is $21$. The answer is D.
